page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i1.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing a total of 8 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance comes bundled with 446 GB of local SSD capacity. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate that the ecs.i1.2xlarge delivers modest compute capabilities. In stress-ng testing, both single-core and multi-core CPU performance fall into the bottom 25% tier. Similarly, memory bandwidth read-only tests show weak performance, though large block write operations achieve an average rating at 35.61 GB/sec. The instance demonstrates average performance in Redis SET operations, reaching 5.89 million operations per second, and in small-model LLM inference, processing prompts at 471.72 tokens per second. However, heavier workloads like 7B LLM inference and static web serving register in the lower performance brackets.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.i1.2xlarge offers dedicated CPU cores and bundled local SSD storage, which can be advantageous for workloads requiring predictable compute allocation without the premium price of newer-generation architectures. However, the older Intel Xeon processor presents a tradeoff in raw processing power and instruction efficiency. This server is best suited for general-purpose workloads, moderate database operations, caching layers like Redis, and lightweight web serving where local storage speed is beneficial but extreme CPU throughput is not required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i1.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor operating at 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 8 dedicated physical cores, 32.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 446 GB local SSD. Network performance is anchored by a 2 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Benchmarks reveal modest compute capabilities, with single-core and multi-core stress-ng scores in the bottom 25% tier, alongside weak memory read bandwidth. However, the instance achieves average marks in large-block memory writes and Redis SET operations, processing 5.89 million operations per second. Qualitatively, the ecs.i1.2xlarge represents a budget-friendly option for dedicated resources, trading off raw CPU performance for bundled local storage. It is best suited for general-purpose applications, caching layers, and moderate database workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i1.2xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and a bundled 446 GB local SSD, offering balanced resources for general-purpose workloads.

tagline: A dedicated-core server with bundled local SSD storage, balanced for general-purpose workloads and caching applications requiring predictable resource allocation.

32 GB of system memory with 4 GB per core
Bundled 446 GB local SSD storage capacity
